transactions.desc: The Giants recalled Brennan from Triple-A Sacramento on Saturday.
The Rockies reinstated Feltner (elbow) from the injured list ahead of his start Saturday against the Giants.
The Athletics recalled Kelly from Triple-A Las Vegas on Saturday.
The Phillies reinstated Pop (calf) from the injured list Saturday and designated him for assignment.
The Phillies reinstated Lazar (oblique) from the 60-day injured list Saturday and optioned him to Triple-A Lehigh Valley.
The Reds designated Nicolas for assignment Saturday.
The Reds selected Richardson's contract from Triple-A Louisville on Saturday.
The Marlins recalled Kempner from Triple-A Jacksonville on Saturday.
Heasley cleared waivers and was outrighted to Triple-A Durham on Saturday, Marc Topkin of the Tampa Bay Times reports.
Kelenic cleared waivers and opted to become a free agent Saturday, Scott Merkin of MLB.com reports.
Toronto designated Voth for assignment Saturday, Mitch Bannon of The Athletic reports.
The Mets designated Severino for assignment Saturday.
The Mets selected Perez's contract from Triple-A Syracuse on Saturday.
The Mets optioned Myers to Triple-A Syracuse on Saturday.
The Rays optioned Bigge to Triple-A Durham on Saturday.
The Rays reinstated Sulser (back) from the injured list Saturday.
The White Sox selected Gonzalez's contract from Triple-A Charlotte on Saturday.
The Twins recalled Klein from Triple-A St. Paul on Saturday.
The Twins designated Woods Richardson for assignment Saturday.
The Dodgers signed Espinal to a contract Friday, Maddie Lee of the Los Angeles Times reports.
The Tigers reinstated Brieske (thigh) from the 60-day IL on Friday.
The Giants reinstated Webb (knee) from the 15-day injured list ahead of his scheduled start against the Rockies on Friday.
The Giants activated Lee (back) from the 10-day injured list, and he will start in right field and bat sixth against the Rockies on Friday, Justice delos Santos of The San Jose Mercury News reports.
The Marlins recalled Ekness from Triple-A Jacksonville on Friday.
The Marlins optioned Pauley to Triple-A Jacksonville on Friday, Christina De Nicola of MLB.com reports.
The Marlins activated Jimenez from the 7-day concussion injured list Friday,Christina De Nicola of MLB.com reports.
The Phillies recalled Hoffman from Triple-A Lehigh Valley on Friday.
The Phillies recalled Berroa from Triple-A Lehigh Valley on Friday.
The Phillies optioned Kemp to Triple-A Lehigh Valley on Friday.
The Orioles optioned Weston to Triple-A Norfolk on Friday.
